overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a character walking along a coastal promenade at sunset, transitioning through a parking lot with modern architecture, crossing a highway, and continuing along a dirt shoulder. The scene features dramatic orange and purple sunset skies, coastal mountains, and moderate vehicle traffic including a distinctive taco truck.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete coastal promenade toward the parking area

entered.detail: calm ocean extending to the horizon with sun reflecting off the surface
tall decorative black lamppost with multiple lanterns
mountain range running parallel to the coastline
tall palm tree silhouetted against the sunset sky
wide paved walkway with low concrete barriers separating it from the beach

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a serene coastal promenade at golden hour, with the sun setting over the ocean to the left. The camera moves forward along the concrete walkway, passing ornate street lamps and palm trees, with mountains visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal parking lot with modern architecture

events.description: transitions from coastal promenade into paved parking lot area

agents.ego_description: traversing the parking lot between parked vehicles toward the street

entered.detail: modern cylindrical building with reflective glass facade and curved architecture
paved parking area with white painted lines and several parked cars
reddish-brown rocky cliff face behind the modern building
wooden utility pole with power lines running along the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the waterfront into a parking lot dominated by a distinctive curved modern glass building on the right. The ground changes from concrete to asphalt as the camera weaves between parked cars, with the coastal mountains now visible to the left.

events.description: crosses the multi-lane highway from the parking lot to the dirt shoulder
taco food truck drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: crossing the highway and moving onto the dirt shoulder while avoiding traffic

notable_agents.action: white and yellow taco truck with 'Attack-A-Taco' signage driving along the highway

entered.detail: multi-lane highway with moving traffic and lane markings
unpaved dirt and grass area alongside the highway
short yellow and black striped bollards marking the parking lot exit
distant gas station canopy visible down the highway

segments.scene_description: The character crosses from the parking lot onto the highway, navigating between moving vehicles. A distinctive taco truck passes by on the right as the character reaches the dirt shoulder. The environment transitions from urban pavement to natural dirt terrain alongside the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder dirt path at sunset

events.description: semi truck with yellow trailer passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt shoulder parallel to the highway traffic

notable_agents.action: large semi truck with yellow trailer driving along the highway

entered.detail: busy multi-lane highway with continuous vehicle traffic
series of wooden utility poles with power lines running parallel to the highway
thick bushes and small trees on the hillside away from the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the dirt shoulder alongside the busy highway as the sunset intensifies with deep orange and purple hues. The character walks past utility poles and dense vegetation while various vehicles including a semi truck pass by on the right, with distant mountains framing the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a serene coastal promenade that gradually transitions into a busy highway shoulder under an intensifying sunset. It begins along a concrete walkway lined with palm trees and ornate lamps, with the sun dipping toward the ocean and mountains framing the distance. As the camera moves inland, the scene shifts from the waterfront into an asphalt parking lot dominated by a curved modern glass building. The movement then carries the character across the highway, weaving through traffic and passing a distinctive taco truck before the pavement gives way to a natural dirt shoulder. Finally, the environment opens up along the roadside, passing utility poles and dense vegetation as the sky deepens into vibrant orange and purple hues.
